The '''unidentified Rebel Vanguard''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and became a member of the [[Rebel Vanguard/Legends|Rebel vanguard division]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] he accompanied [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] on a scouting mission to [[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]] to look for a new base for the Alliance. After serving at Boz Pity, the [[Mon Calamari (language)/Legends|Mon Calamarian]] took a small party with him to go look at [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]], the Vanguard included. Saleucami was another possible location for a new base. They never made it.

While on their way to the planet, their [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was attacked and boarded by the infamous [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. The Vanguard survived the attack but was captured by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]. He and the rest of the scout party, minus Ackbar who was sold to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], were sold to the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]. During the [[Mission to Mos Eisley (Galactic Civil War|Mission to Mos Eisley]], he and the other rebel prisoners were freed by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]''
